svg:
<svg id="006-memory-layout" viewBox="0 0 760 310" role="img" aria-label="程序运行内存区域" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">程序运行内存区域</text><rect class="box" x="80" y="75" width="250" height="190" rx="10"/><text class="text" x="205" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">栈区 stack</text><rect x="125" y="132" width="160" height="26" rx="5" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".14"/><text class="text small" x="205" y="150" text-anchor="middle">参数 n</text><rect x="125" y="170" width="160" height="26" rx="5" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".14"/><text class="text small" x="205" y="188" text-anchor="middle">局部变量 i</text><rect x="125" y="208" width="160" height="26" rx="5" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".14"/><text class="text small" x="205" y="226" text-anchor="middle">返回地址</text><rect class="pulse" x="100" y="238" width="210" height="8" rx="4" fill="#2563eb"/><rect class="box" x="420" y="75" width="250" height="190" rx="10"/><text class="text" x="545" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">堆区 heap</text><rect x="465" y="132" width="160" height="26" rx="5" fill="#f97316" opacity=".14"/><text class="text small" x="545" y="150" text-anchor="middle">malloc 结点</text><rect x="465" y="170" width="160" height="26" rx="5" fill="#f97316" opacity=".14"/><text class="text small" x="545" y="188" text-anchor="middle">动态数组</text><rect x="465" y="208" width="160" height="26" rx="5" fill="#f97316" opacity=".14"/><text class="text small" x="545" y="226" text-anchor="middle">需要 free</text><rect class="pulse" x="440" y="238" width="210" height="8" rx="4" fill="#f97316"/><path class="arrow dash" d="M330 170 H420"/></svg>

<svg id="006-array-space" viewBox="0 0 760 260" role="img" aria-label="数组空间增长" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">数组空间增长</text><text class="text small" x="24" y="64">长度 n 与 n x n 数组的空间数量级。</text><rect class="box" x="70" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="112" y="139" text-anchor="middle">0</text><text class="text tiny" x="112" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 0</text><rect class="box" x="154" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="196" y="139" text-anchor="middle">1</text><text class="text tiny" x="196" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 1</text><rect class="box" x="238" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="280" y="139" text-anchor="middle">2</text><text class="text tiny" x="280" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 2</text><rect class="box" x="322" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="364" y="139" text-anchor="middle">3</text><text class="text tiny" x="364" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 3</text><rect class="box" x="406" y="105" width="84" height="54"/><text class="text" x="448" y="139" text-anchor="middle">...</text><text class="text tiny" x="448" y="179" text-anchor="middle">下标 4</text><rect class="accent pulse" x="70" y="81" width="36" height="8" rx="4"/><text class="text small" x="24" y="222">连续单元表示物理地址相邻，访问时按元素大小跳转。</text></svg>

<svg id="006-recursion-stack" viewBox="0 0 760 310" role="img" aria-label="递归调用栈" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">递归调用栈</text><rect class="box" x="80" y="75" width="250" height="190" rx="10"/><text class="text" x="205" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">栈区 stack</text><rect x="125" y="132" width="160" height="26" rx="5" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".14"/><text class="text small" x="205" y="150" text-anchor="middle">参数 n</text><rect x="125" y="170" width="160" height="26" rx="5" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".14"/><text class="text small" x="205" y="188" text-anchor="middle">局部变量 i</text><rect x="125" y="208" width="160" height="26" rx="5" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".14"/><text class="text small" x="205" y="226" text-anchor="middle">返回地址</text><rect class="pulse" x="100" y="238" width="210" height="8" rx="4" fill="#2563eb"/><rect class="box" x="420" y="75" width="250" height="190" rx="10"/><text class="text" x="545" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">堆区 heap</text><rect x="465" y="132" width="160" height="26" rx="5" fill="#f97316" opacity=".14"/><text class="text small" x="545" y="150" text-anchor="middle">malloc 结点</text><rect x="465" y="170" width="160" height="26" rx="5" fill="#f97316" opacity=".14"/><text class="text small" x="545" y="188" text-anchor="middle">动态数组</text><rect x="465" y="208" width="160" height="26" rx="5" fill="#f97316" opacity=".14"/><text class="text small" x="545" y="226" text-anchor="middle">需要 free</text><rect class="pulse" x="440" y="238" width="210" height="8" rx="4" fill="#f97316"/><path class="arrow dash" d="M330 170 H420"/></svg>

<svg id="006-recursion-sum" viewBox="0 0 760 260" role="img" aria-label="递归每层数组求和" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" x="0" y="0" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">递归每层数组求和</text><rect class="box pulse" x="30" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="105" y="143" text-anchor="middle">开始</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 188 137 H 297"/><rect class="box" x="305" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="380" y="143" text-anchor="middle">每层空间不同时需累加后取数量级</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 463 137 H 572"/><rect class="box" x="580" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="655" y="143" text-anchor="middle">结束</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="48" cy="205" r="8"/><text class="text small" x="66" y="210">动画高亮表示处理步骤正在推进</text></svg>
